name: SWIFT Customer Security Programme (CSCF)
description: SWIFT Customer Security Controls Framework — mandatory cybersecurity controls for institutions using the SWIFT financial messaging network. Annual self-attestation required.
relationToCloudSecurity: Applies to cloud-hosted systems within scope.
relationToAISecurity: Applies to AI systems within scope.
